title: Increase Font Size
excerpt: Hy all, Is there any way to increase the size of the font on Monday? Thank you!

posts.author: pacarvalho (Pedro Carvalho)
posts.cookedHtml: Hy all, Is there any way to increase the size of the font on Monday? Thank you!

posts.author: ValerieD (Valerie Duever)
posts.cookedHtml:
It is done through your browser. For Chrome users, The browser controls are the snowman dots in the upper right hand corner, and the “Zoom” setting is in the middle.
Monday’s accessibility states says for Visual Design : All pages and content may be enlarged using standard browser controls or screen magnification software. Text on pages is designed to have sufficient contrast with its background. Hope this helps.

posts.author: Sotiris (bootstraps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Its indeed in the browser.
CMND + (for apple)
CRTL + (for windows)

It also works in the desktop app from Monday.
